Tansa Wind & Solar Limited (TWASL), a fictional listed company on NSE, reports a cyber incident under SEBI LODR and PIT considerations.
On 04-06-2026, suspicious sign-in to the corporate mail of Mr. Rohan Dev, Deputy Finance Manager, from Vasant Tech Park (Pune) triggered an alert.
The account rohan.dev@tansawsl.in on device TWASL-LAP-229 (Windows 11) initiated an anomalous OWA session id SESS-7F3C9-PN, with IP 172.22.91.14 and VPN tag TWASL-GW-04.
Weak identifiers linked to Mr. Rohan Dev include DOB 14-06-1991, work extension 040-7782 (mobile ending 7082), PAN ending QZ7, and Aadhaar last four 4506 maintained in HRIS.
Two exfiltrated attachments contained UPSI: draft board note on an unannounced PPA tariff revision and preliminary Q1 results of TWASL, both unpublished and price-sensitive under SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015.
The Compliance Officer closed the trading window w.e.f. 05-06-2026, updated the insider list, and notified the stock exchanges; no trades by designated persons were detected post-incident.
A child visitor registration from a community tour stored age 16 and guardian email parent.contact@familynilayam.example without any Aadhaar capture, with verifiable parental consent recorded and now revoked.
Aggregate descriptors such as “engineers aged 25–35 at the Harigunj wind farm cluster” are not identifying on their own and remain outside the scope of specific notification.
Separately observed weak identifiers not tied to a named person include a contractor role “Night Shift Technician” in Shivannagar unit, Android device code XZ-55A, access badge 3F-17, and PAN fragment **9Q2.
A lone DOB 02-08-1987 appears in a network log alongside city tag Kaveripur and Wi-Fi SSID TWASL-GUEST-2G, but no name, employee code, or contact information is associated.
Limited vendor KYC scans of Suryamukhi EPC Private Limited (GSTIN masked …7H2) were accessed; bank account numbers and directors’ IDs were fully redacted in the leaked copies.
We have implemented password resets, EDR quarantine of TWASL-LAP-229, geo-fencing for O365, and a Rule 7 DPDPA breach assessment; consent and notice under Sections 5–8 have been refreshed.
No government ID numbers in full, no health data, and no children’s school records were processed in the compromised mailbox; payroll data tables were summary-only.
For queries, contact Mr. Prakash Vaidyanathan (DPO) at dpo@tansawsl.in; please do not include PAN/Aadhaar details in your emails.
